ui.shareTitle: Copy a shareable link to this exact dough
ui.resetTitle: Reset sliders to this style's defaults
ui.sourdoughNote: Sourdough {name}: {notes} Expect a longer, more flavorful ferment.
ui.starterHint: Starter = {flour} flour + {water} water (already counted in the totals). Feed it 4–8h before mixing.
ui.loadError: Couldn't load the config files. Serve this page over http (e.g. python3 -m http.server) instead of opening it directly from disk.

preferment.poolishHint: Equal-weight flour & water + a pinch of the yeast. Ferment 12–16h at room temp until domed and bubbly, then mix into the final dough.
preferment.bigaHint: Stiff, low-hydration preferment + a pinch of the yeast. Ferment 12–18h (cooler is better) before the final mix.
preferment.waterWarn: ⚠️ Preferment needs more water than the whole recipe has. Lower the preferment % or the preferment is wetter than the dough.

tips.sourdough: Tip: feed starter 4–8h before mixing; bulk until ~50% risen, then ball & proof.

methods.poolishWindow: 12–16h at room temp until bubbly and domed
methods.bigaWindow: 12–18h (cooler is better) until risen and webby
straight: Mix {flour} flour, {water} water and {yeast} yeast; rest 15–20 min.
Add {salt} salt{extrasClause}; knead to a smooth, elastic dough.
Bulk ferment ~{hours}h, or until roughly doubled.
Divide into {count} panetti × {ballWeight} and shape into tight balls.
Proof 2–4h (or cold-proof overnight), then stretch, top, and bake as hot as your oven allows.
preferment: Night before — mix the {label}: {preFlour} flour + {preWater} water + {preYeast} yeast. Ferment {preWindow}.
Mixing day — combine the {label} with {finalFlour} flour, {finalWater} water{finalYeastClause}, then add {salt} salt{extrasClause}.
Knead to a smooth, elastic dough.
Bulk ferment ~{hours}h, or until roughly doubled.
Divide into {count} panetti × {ballWeight} and shape into tight balls.
Proof 2–4h (or cold-proof overnight), then stretch, top, and bake as hot as your oven allows.
sourdough: Feed your starter 4–8h before mixing; use {starter} at its peak.
Mix {flour} flour with {water} water; rest 30–60 min (autolyse).
Add the starter and {salt} salt{extrasClause}; do 3–4 sets of stretch & folds.
Bulk ferment until ~50% risen and airy.
Divide into {count} panetti × {ballWeight} and shape into tight balls.
Cold-proof overnight (or ~2–4h at room temp), then stretch, top, and bake as hot as your oven allows.
